content: Start the concept note interview for Porto Alegre. Use the /concept-note skill flow. Always use the ask_user tool for multiple-choice questions instead of writing them as text.

Municipality **Porto Alegre / Rio Grande do Sul** already saved to the document. Please answer the 4 questions above to complete Phase 1 — I'll fill each field as soon as you respond.
Municipality **Porto Alegre / Rio Grande do Sul** already saved to the document. Please answer the 4 questions above to complete Phase 1 — I'll fill each field as soon as you respond.
Soluções Baseadas na Natureza (NBS); Ambos; Regenera Porto Alegre — Soluções Baseadas na Natureza para Resiliência Climática; Prefeitura de Porto Alegre / SMAMUS
Phase 1 complete. Advancing to Phase 2 and auto-filling context sections.
Context and diagnosis auto-filled from the knowledge base. Please review **Contexto Territorial** and **Diagnóstico** in the document panel, then answer the 3 questions above.
Context and diagnosis auto-filled from the knowledge base. Please review **Contexto Territorial** and **Diagnóstico** in the document panel, then answer the 3 questions above.

Zona Norte / Humaitá-Navegantes; Aprovado — foco em enchentes + calor + déficit de infraestrutura verde; Aumentar a resiliência climática de Porto Alegre por meio de soluções baseadas na natureza, reduzindo riscos de enchentes, calor urbano e deslizamentos e promovendo justiça socioambiental
Now reading intervention files to auto-fill Phase 3.
Phase 2 saved. Advancing to Phase 3 and auto-filling solution design.
